scope: Attempted to consume the FK-repaired 40-motion public bundle in the official Tracking-Flat-G1-v0 task stack through the official-importer-export G1 USDA.

observed_failure.full_bundle_attempt: The log reached BM_SENTINEL:after_app and printed IsaacLab base environment information, but no env_created sentinel or metrics JSON was written before the wrapper session ended.
observed_failure.bounded_299_step_attempt: The wrapper exited with code 143 during early Isaac Sim/Vulkan startup after BM_SENTINEL:before_app and before BM_SENTINEL:after_app.

interpretation.next_debug_direction: Retest the FK-repaired bundle after stabilizing the live Kit/native startup path, or first split the FK-repaired bundle back into per-motion NPZs and reuse the already-stable 40-process full-dataset task-eval harness.
